positive: A whimsical, stylized illustration of a mystical forest scene under a twilight sky. The main elements include a pair of interlocking, silhouetted crescent moons and a trio of stylized, glowing fireflies forming a ring. The forest is composed of various ancient, curved trees with exaggerated, elegant branches, forming a perfect circular vignette. The color palette is deep indigo, forest emerald green, and luminous gold, with strong backlighting creating a high contrast silhouette effect. The style is highly detailed, symmetrical, Art Nouveau-inspired vector illustration suitable for direct print-on-apparel placement. Clean line work, central composition, perfect circular crop.
